name: nova-ui-workspace
description: Enterprise React component library; dumi docs (primary)

scripts.dev:docs: npm run build:ui && npm run docs:api --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui && npm run dev --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui-docs-dumi
scripts.build:docs: npm run docs:api --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui && npm run build --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui-docs-dumi
scripts.build:docs:dumi: npm run docs:api --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui && npm run build --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui-docs-dumi
scripts.dev:docs:dumi: npm run build:ui && npm run docs:api --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui && npm run dev --workspace @wuyangfan/nova-ui-docs-dumi
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:docs
